    Next

    Just In: Men’s New Arrivals

    You’ve got goals. Let’s work together to crush them—and the next. New Under Armour men’s clothing carries the same mindset we’ve put in everything we do. That’s to make you better. Find the latest men’s clothing and other men’s sportswear like athletic shorts, shoes, shirts, hats, and more. Game-changing technologies fight-off sweat. They keep you cool, stretch with your for comfort, dry fast, and more. Our latest men’s clothing works alongside you, not against you. Because when you’re putting in the work, the last thing you need is a pair of shorts that don’t budge, a shirt that weighs you down in sweat, and a pair of shoes that’s got less traction than an old car tire.

     

    Check out new fleece joggers that are made with soft fabrics that you’ll want to wear pretty much everywhere. Shirts with UA Tech™ are super light. Men’s shorts for pretty much every sport that keep you cool and dry. And, new colorways and other designs are here, letting you show some personality and the work you put in everywhere you go.

     

    Pre-game, post-run, and whatever it is in-between, our new men’s athletic shoes make sure of one thing: Your feet stay comfortable no matter what. Training shoes made with Charged Cushioning® absorb impact and return energy, helping you push through the heaviest of lifts and longest of runs. Lightweight and breathable uppers make going baseline to baseline a breeze. Soft, EVA cushioned footbeds make our men’s slides the perfect post-workout footwear. Our men’s new arrivals and new releases are made to perform, just like you.

     

    Check out our new arrivals in sportswear and athletic shoes for the whole squad. Shop women’s and kids’ new arrivals.
